tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every fail-to-pass test uses only `assert ... in content` or `re.search(pattern, content)` on the file text. An agent could add a dead-code comment block containing all required strings ('ensureModelInfo', 'modelInfoPromise', 'explicitContextLength', '!parts || parts.length < 2', 'Promise.resolve()') without implementing any actual fix, and all tests would pass.
